login.subtitle: Sign in to the operations console

customers.title: 360° customer view
customers.body: Bring every customer onto one screen — accounts, transactions and risk together.

risk.title: Risk & compliance, live
risk.body: Track KYC, AML and on-chain risk with audit-ready trails.

realtime.title: Real-time operations
realtime.body: Manage flows, approvals and alerts without delay.

login.demoNote: Demo environment — all data is simulated. No real customer information is shown.

demo.title: Try a demo role
demo.subtitle: Pick a role to prefill the form, then sign in.
demo.fillAria: Fill the sign-in form with the {{role}} demo account

administrator.name: Administrator
administrator.desc: Full access — reveal PII, delete, manage roles & users

operator.name: Compliance Officer
operator.desc: Day-to-day operations — no delete or PII reveal

login.locked: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
login.lockedRetry: Too many attempts. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Verify your identity and set a new password on screen.
forgot.brandBody: No email is sent — prove your identity with two-step verification and set your new password right here.

identify.intro: Enter the email linked to your account.

verify.intro: Enter the current code from your authenticator app for {{email}}.
verify.introBackup: Enter one of your one-time backup codes for {{email}}.

done.title: Your password has been updated
done.body: Your password has been changed and all other sessions were signed out. Sign in with your new password to continue.

error.invalidCode: That code is incorrect or has expired. Please enter it again.
error.factorRequired: A verification code is required. Please enter the code again.
error.expired: This reset request has expired. Please start over.
error.weakPassword: That password does not meet the requirements. Please choose a stronger one.
error.samePassword: Your new password must be different from your current one.
error.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
error.rateLimitRetry: Too many attempts. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

expired.title: Reset request expired
expired.body: This password reset can no longer be completed. Start over to request a new one.

adminRequest.link: I can't access my authenticator — request an administrator reset
adminRequest.title: Request an administrator reset
adminRequest.intro: Send a password-reset request to your administrators. An administrator verifies your identity and approves the request; you then set your own new password on this screen.
adminRequest.waitingBody: Your request has been received. If you already have a pending request, you can continue from this screen once an administrator approves it.
adminRequest.waitingHint: This screen checks the status automatically every 20 seconds. You can keep it open; approval may take a while.
adminRequest.deniedBody: An administrator declined this reset request. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your administrator directly.

error.expired: The request expired before it was completed. Please send a new request.
error.generic: The request could not be processed right now. Please try again.

adminContact.title: Need help signing in?
adminContact.body: Self-service reset requires two-step verification on your account. If you can’t complete it, ask an administrator to reset your password.

trend.title: Customer trend
trend.noDataForRange: No customer trend data for this range.

empty.portfolioMessage: There are no customers to show yet.
empty.latestMessage: No customers have been registered yet.

customers.title: Customers
customers.name: Name
customers.keepCurrentHint: Leave blank to keep the current value
customers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
customers.emptyMessage: Get started by adding your first customer.
customers.noResultsMessage: Try adjusting your search or filters.

formHero.createSubtitle: Add a new customer record to the operations console.

guidance.wallet: A default wallet is created automatically with the customer.
guidance.kyc: KYC status is managed by the operator after creation.
guidance.privacy: Name, email and phone are stored masked for privacy.
guidance.nationalId: The national ID is validated and cannot be changed later.

customerDetail.title: Customer Detail
customerDetail.transactionsSubtitle: Filters, new transaction entry, and ledger history in one workspace.
customerDetail.dailyVsMonthly: Daily limit as a share of monthly limit

kycHistory.title: KYC history
kycHistory.empty: No KYC history has been recorded for this customer.

riskCard.title: Web3 risk screening
riskCard.subtitle: Read-only on-chain risk intelligence for this customer

riskHistory.title: Risk decision history
riskHistory.empty: No risk decisions have been recorded for this customer.

notFound.title: Customer not found
notFound.desc: This customer may have been deleted, archived, or opened from an invalid record link.

clues.removed: The record may have been removed
clues.invalidId: The customer id in the link may be invalid
clues.searchAgain: Search again from the list to continue

create.title: Create transaction
create.subtitle: The transaction posts through this customer's current wallet.
create.filteredOut: Transaction created; it may be hidden by the active filters.
create.walletRequired: The backend must return a wallet id before a transaction can be created.

validation.multipleSpaces: Please use a single space between words.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.maxLength: Please enter no more than {{max}} characters.
validation.digitsMax: Please enter no more than {{max}} digits.
validation.surnameRequired: Please provide both first and last name.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.nameInvalid: Name may contain letters, spaces, apostrophes, and hyphens only.
validation.dateInFuture: Date cannot be in the future.
validation.minAge: Customer must be at least {{min}} years old.
validation.maxAge: Customer age must be no more than {{max}}.
validation.limitMismatch: Daily limit must be less than monthly limit.
validation.nationalIdNumeric: National ID must contain digits only.
validation.alphaOnly: This field may contain letters, spaces, apostrophes, and hyphens only.
validation.postalCodeInvalid: Postal code must be numeric (4–10 digits).

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.server: A system error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.conflict: This record was changed by someone else. Please reload and try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again.

Auth.AccountLocked: The account is temporarily locked after too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
Auth.Forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
Auth.InvalidToken: Your session could not be verified. Please sign in again.
Auth.MfaEnrollmentRequired: You must complete two-step verification setup before signing in.
Auth.PermissionsStale: Your access permissions changed. Please sign in again.
Auth.ResetChallengeConsumed: This verification step was already used. Please restart the reset.
Auth.ResetChallengeInvalid: The password reset session is invalid or has expired. Please start over.
Auth.ResetChallengeMissing: No password reset session was found. Please start over.
Auth.ResetFactorRequired: You need to verify your code before continuing.
Auth.ResetInvalidCode: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
Auth.ResetRequestAlreadyDecided: This reset request was already decided. Refresh the list to see its current state.
Auth.ResetRequestExpired: This reset request has expired and can no longer be decided.
Auth.ResetRequestNotFound: The reset request was not found. It may have been removed; refresh the list.
Auth.SamePassword: The new password cannot be the same as your current password.
Auth.SelfResetForbidden: You cannot use this reset path for your own account.
Auth.StreamTokenInvalid: The live stream could not be authorized. Refresh the page.
Auth.StreamTokenMissing: Live stream authorization is missing. Refresh the page.
Auth.TokenInvalid: The session is invalid. Please sign in again.
Auth.TokenMissing: No session found. Please sign in.
Auth.TokenReused: All sessions were ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.
Auth.WeakPassword: The password does not meet the requirements. Choose a stronger one.

Customers.Conflict: The customer record changed while you were viewing it. Reload and try again.
Customers.DuplicateEmail: This email address is already registered to another customer.
Customers.DuplicateNationalId: This national ID is already registered to another customer.
Customers.IllegalKycTransition: This KYC status transition is not allowed.
Customers.IllegalStatusTransition: This customer status transition is not allowed.

Database.Unavailable: The database is currently unavailable. Please try again shortly.

Idempotency.InFlight: The same request is already being processed. Please wait for it to finish.
Idempotency.KeyConflict: This request key was used by a different request. Please retry the operation.
Idempotency.KeyRequired: A request key is required for this operation.

Internal.Error: An unexpected system error occurred. Please try again.

Mfa.AlreadyEnrolled: Two-step verification is already enabled on this account.
Mfa.ChallengeConsumed: This verification session was already used. Please sign in again.
Mfa.ChallengeInvalid: The verification session is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.
Mfa.ChallengeMissing: No verification session was found. Please sign in again.
Mfa.InvalidCode: The verification code is incorrect. Please try the current code.
Mfa.NoSetupInProgress: No two-step verification setup is in progress. Please start the setup again.
Mfa.NotEnabled: Two-step verification is not enabled on this account.
Mfa.SelfResetForbidden: You cannot reset your own two-step verification through the admin path.
Mfa.WrongChallenge: The verification session does not match this operation. Please try again.

Notification.ForbiddenParam: The notification content contains a disallowed field.
Notification.ParamsTooLarge: The notification content is too large.

Query.DateRangeRequired: A valid date range is required for this query.
Query.MetricRequired: A metric must be selected for this query.

Rbac.LastAdmin: This change cannot be applied because it would remove the last administrator capability.
Rbac.SelfEscalation: You cannot change your own privileges this way.

Resource.Conflict: The record changed while you were viewing it. Reload and try again.

Risk.CustomerNotFound: Customer not found for the risk check.
Risk.MislabeledSimulation: Rule-based screening must keep its safety flag. The decision was not recorded.

Transactions.AlreadyReversed: This transaction has already been reversed.
Transactions.CrossCurrency: Transactions across different currencies are not supported.
Transactions.InsufficientBalance: The wallet balance is insufficient for this transaction.
Transactions.KindNotImplemented: This transaction kind is not supported yet.
Transactions.OriginalNotFound: The original transaction for the reversal was not found.
Transactions.ReversalMismatch: The reversal does not match the original transaction.
Transactions.SameWallet: The source and target wallets cannot be the same.
Transactions.SystemWalletMissing: The system wallet is not configured. Please contact your administrator.

Validation.Failed: The submitted data failed validation. Please check the fields.

Wallets.Conflict: The wallet changed while you were viewing it. Reload and try again.
Wallets.InvalidLimits: The daily limit must be less than the monthly limit.

web3.title: Web3 Risk & Compliance
web3.subtitle: Read-only on-chain wallet risk intelligence to inform a KYC decision

context.title: Customer context
context.subtitle: The customer whose declared wallet you are screening
context.walletNote: Case-study account number — not an on-chain address.

operator.title: Operator wallet
operator.subtitle: Optional — connect your own wallet for an audit attestation
operator.signatureHint: Signature only — no transaction, no custody, no private keys.

wallet.notFound: No browser wallet detected. Read-only screening still works.
wallet.error: Could not connect to the wallet.

screen.title: Screened wallet address
screen.subtitle: Enter the customer's declared on-chain address to screen it.
screen.invalid: Enter a valid 0x address (40 hex characters).
screen.checksumNote: Format check only — full EIP-55 checksum is out of scope.

facts.title: On-chain facts
facts.subtitle: Live, key-free JSON-RPC reads from the configured node
facts.error: Could not read on-chain data right now. Please try again.
facts.emptyDesc: Balance, nonce, and account type will appear here after a declared 0x address is screened.

risk.title: Risk intelligence
risk.subtitle: Labeled signals returned by the backend risk screening API
risk.lastTxNote: Derived reference — not a real transaction; no explorer link.
risk.emptyDesc: When the screening address derived from the customer record loads, rule-based signals will be listed here with labels.

sim.providers: This environment is not connected to live Chainalysis / TRM Labs / OFAC providers. Signals are deterministic rule-based compliance signals derived from customer/wallet input.

explanation.template: Heuristic assessment: {{count}} signal(s) flagged ({{list}}). Recommended action: {{decision}}. (rule-based)

vc.title: Verifiable credential (concept preview)
vc.subtitle: Illustrative W3C VC. No real cryptographic verification is performed.
vc.flow: In production: issuer signs → holder stores → verifier checks the proof. No PII goes on-chain.
vc.emptyDesc: This section is fed by the backend credential-preview endpoint. If the endpoint does not respond, the concept preview is not shown.

record.title: Compliance decision
record.subtitle: Record your recommendation for this screening
record.demoNote: Decision saved to the audit log; the underlying risk signals are rule-based and not live AML-provider advice.
record.waitForScreen: Decision buttons become available after a screening result is produced.

web3.signMessage: Fintech Ops compliance audit — screening wallet {{address}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.localOnly: Stored on this device only — never sent to a server.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your personal information
profile.emailReadonlyHint: Managed by access administrators; cannot be changed here.

theme.label: Theme
theme.hint: Choose light, dark, or system theme

density.label: Density
density.hint: Adjust the spacing of interface elements

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Select your preferred interface language
language.label: Display language
language.hint: This applies to all interface text

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose what notifies you
notifications.productUpdatesHint: Get notified about new features and improvements
notifications.securityAlertsHint: Be alerted about important security events
notifications.weeklyDigestHint: Receive a weekly summary of your activity

access.title: Account access
access.subtitle: Review the permissions granted to the signed-in account
access.loadFailed: Service health could not be loaded. Your account permissions are still shown from the active session.
access.noPermissions: No permissions are granted to this account.
access.sensitiveNote: Written to the audit log on use

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Live aggregates from your customer and transaction data.
analytics.updatedHint: Daily rollup data: this screen shows end-of-day aggregated metrics; it can trail the dashboard summary's live "as of now" count.

volume.title: Volume over time
volume.subtitle: Transaction volume by {{range}}
volume.noDataForRange: No transaction volume data for this range.

status.title: Customer status
status.subtitle: Active vs inactive customers
status.summary: Active vs inactive customer counts bar chart

empty.title: No analytics data
empty.message: There is no customer data to show yet.

verify.title: Two-step verification
verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
verify.backupSubtitle: Enter one of your single-use backup codes.
verify.backupCodeHint: Please enter a valid backup code.
verify.rememberDeviceHint: This device will skip the code prompt for a while.
verify.error: That code could not be verified. Please try again.

setup.pageSubtitle: Add a second layer to your account with an authenticator app.
setup.reauthHint: For security, please re-enter your account password.
setup.scanHint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the key manually.
setup.backupSaveHint: Store these codes somewhere safe. They are shown only once and each can be used a single time.
setup.startError: Could not start setup. Check your password and try again.
setup.confirmError: That code could not be verified. Please try again.

settings.cardSubtitle: Add an authenticator-based second layer to sign-in.
settings.statusHint: Shows whether two-step verification is active for this account.
settings.actionError: That action could not be completed. Check your password and code.
settings.disableReauthHint: To disable, enter your password and a verification code.
settings.regenerateReauthHint: For new backup codes, enter your password and a verification code.
settings.reauthCodeInvalid: Enter a 6-digit code or a backup code in the XXXXX-XXXXX format.
settings.newBackupHint: New codes were generated. Store them safely; the old codes are now invalid.

devices.title: Trusted devices
devices.subtitle: Devices you chose to remember skip the verification code until they expire. Revoke any you no longer use.
devices.empty: No trusted devices. When you choose “remember this device” at sign-in, it will appear here.
devices.errorBody: We couldn’t load your trusted devices. Please try again.
devices.revokeAria: Revoke the trusted device on network {{network}}
devices.confirmBody: The next sign-in from this device will require a verification code again. This cannot be undone.
devices.revokeError: Could not revoke the device. Please try again.

adminReset.heading: Reset an operator's two-step verification
adminReset.intro: For a locked-out operator, reset their two-step verification. This wipes their authenticator, backup codes, and remembered devices — they must enrol again to sign in with a second factor.
adminReset.confirmBody: This permanently clears the operator's authenticator, backup codes, and remembered devices. They will have to enrol again. This cannot be undone.

success.title: Two-step verification reset
success.body: The operator's MFA has been cleared. They must re-enrol to use a second factor again.

error.selfReset: You can't reset your own MFA here. Use the security settings on your own account.
error.invalidTarget: No operator matches that user ID. Check the ID and try again.
error.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.generic: The reset could not be completed. Please try again.

adminReset.heading: Reset operator password
adminReset.intro: Reset a locked-out operator's password as an administrator. This is a recovery path.
adminReset.bannerBody: The operator's active sessions end and the action is written to the audit log.

what.assign: A temporary password is assigned to the operator.
what.sessions: All of the operator's open sessions are closed.
what.audit: The action is written to the audit log.
what.firstLogin: Changing it on first sign-in is advised — not enforced.

adminReset.pickerHint: Choose the operator whose password you want to reset.
adminReset.pickerFallback: Couldn't load the operator list. Paste the target operator's user ID (UUID) instead.
adminReset.targetHint: Enter the user ID of the operator whose password will be reset.
adminReset.advisory: Share this password with the operator over a secure channel and advise them to change it on first sign-in. This is advisory only and is not enforced by the system.
adminReset.confirmBody: This closes all of the operator's sessions, trusted devices and open reset/MFA challenges, and resets the PASSWORD. It does NOT remove the operator's MFA / authenticator. This cannot be undone.

validation.targetRequired: Select an operator or enter a user ID.
validation.password: The password must meet every requirement and be at most 64 characters.

success.title: Password reset
success.body: The operator's password has been updated; their sessions, trusted devices and open reset/MFA challenges were closed. Their MFA enrollment is preserved.

error.selfReset: You can't reset your own password here. Use the security settings on your own account.
error.unknown: No operator matches that user ID. Check the ID and try again.
error.weak: The password is too weak or unchanged from the current one. Choose a stronger, different password.
error.rate: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.generic: The reset could not be completed. Please try again.

resetRequests.heading: Password reset requests
resetRequests.intro: Operators who cannot complete the self-service reset ask for approval here. Verify the requester's identity out-of-band (in person or over a known channel) before approving — the system cannot do that for you.
resetRequests.empty: No reset requests. When an operator requests an administrator reset, it appears here.

detail.title: Request details
detail.ipNote: Approximate network prefix only — the full IP address is not stored.

confirmApprove.title: Approve this reset request?
confirmApprove.body: Approval lets the requesting browser set a NEW password for this account. Only approve after you have verified the requester's identity out-of-band. The decision is written to the audit log.

confirmDeny.title: Deny this reset request?
confirmDeny.body: The requester is notified that the request was declined and cannot continue with it. The decision is written to the audit log.

resetRequests.approvedNext: Approved: the requester sets their own new password from the forgot-password screen — no password is chosen or seen by an administrator.

error.generic: The operation could not be completed. Please try again.
error.alreadyDecided: This request was already decided elsewhere. The list has been refreshed.
error.expired: This request has expired and can no longer be decided. The list has been refreshed.
error.notFound: This request no longer exists. The list has been refreshed.

page.title: Notifications
page.subtitle: All notifications for your account. Select a notification to go to the related record.
page.emptyBody: When something new happens, it will appear here.
page.emptyFilteredBody: No notifications match the filters you selected.
page.errorBody: We couldn’t load your notifications. Please try again.

created.title: New customer added
created.body: A new customer record was created.

maintenance.title: Scheduled maintenance
maintenance.body: A scheduled maintenance window will take place soon.

signedIn.title: New sign-in to your account
signedIn.body: A new session was opened on your account. If this wasn't you, change your password.

statusChanged.title: KYC status updated
statusChanged.body: A customer's KYC status has changed.

adminPasswordReset.title: Your password was reset
adminPasswordReset.body: An administrator reset your account password. If this wasn't expected, contact your administrator.

adminMfaReset.title: Your two-step verification was reset
adminMfaReset.body: An administrator reset your two-step verification. Set it up again from Settings › Security.

accountLockout.title: Your account was temporarily locked
accountLockout.body: Your account was temporarily locked after repeated failed sign-in attempts. If this wasn't you, reset your password and contact your administrator.

newTrustedDevice.title: A new trusted device was added
newTrustedDevice.body: A new trusted device was registered for your account. If this wasn't you, remove the device from Settings › Security.

resetRequestCreated.title: Password-reset request received
resetRequestCreated.body: {{account}} requested an administrator-approved password reset. Review it on the reset-requests screen.

resetRequestApproved.title: Your reset request was approved
resetRequestApproved.body: An administrator approved your password-reset request. Return to the forgot-password screen to set your new password.

resetRequestDenied.title: Your reset request was declined
resetRequestDenied.body: An administrator declined your password-reset request. Contact your administrator if you didn't expect this.
